'use client' import { useState } from 'react' import type { LucideIcon } from 'lucide-react' import { MinusIcon, PlusIcon } from 'lucide-react' import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button' type ButtonGroupConfig = { initialValue: number maxValue: number minValue: number step: number decrementIcon: LucideIcon decrementLabel: string incrementIcon: LucideIcon incrementLabel: string } const config: ButtonGroupConfig = { initialValue: 2, maxValue: 5, minValue: 0, step: 1, decrementIcon: MinusIcon, decrementLabel: 'Decrease quantity', incrementIcon: PlusIcon, incrementLabel: 'Increase quantity' } const ButtonGroup6 = () => { const [value, setValue] = useState(config.initialValue) const DecrementIcon = config.decrementIcon const IncrementIcon = config.incrementIcon const handleDecrease = () => { setValue((current) => Math.max(config.minValue, current - config.step)) } const handleIncrease = () => { setValue((current) => Math.min(config.maxValue, current + config.step)) } return (
{value}
) } export default ButtonGroup6
